about.heading: About Me
about.bio: I'm a Developer driven by a curiosity for technology. I enjoy learning new concepts, experimenting with AI, and building software that solves actual problems.

stack.heading: The Stack
stack.subtitle: A transparency page about the technologies and decisions behind koze.dev.
stack.tech_stack_desc: Built with Next.js 15, leveraging React 19 and the App Router for a fast, modern web experience.
stack.deployment_desc: Deployed on Vercel with automatic CI/CD from GitHub, ensuring high availability and global performance.
stack.database_desc: PostgreSQL hosted on Prisma Postgres, with Prisma ORM for type-safe database access.
stack.i18n_desc: Multi-language support using next-intl, enabling seamless switching between English and Swedish.
